---
title: "Hands-on: Sharing and Publishing"
author:
  - name: "Gorka Fraga González"
    orcid: 0000-0002-1857-8607
  - name: "Fabio Molo"
    orcid: 0000-0001-9320-5854
format:
  html:
    toc-depth: 4
execute:
  eval: false
---

# Exercise

-   Create a Release in Github.
-   Register a Zenodo account -- if you don't already have one.
-   Start a new upload and reserve a DOI.
-   Store the entire repository .zip file.

You now have a persistent, unique identifier for the analysis you created during this workshop.

# Additional Resources

-   Zenodo: <https://zenodo.org>
-   GitHub Docs on Releases: <https://docs.github.com/en/repositories/releasing-projects-on-github/managing-releases-in-a-repository>
